title: Coleus niveus
taxonomy: Coleus niveus is classified in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Solenostemon, but some sources also place it in the genus Coleus. The species Coleus niveus is native to tropical regions of Africa. It is a type of flowering plant, known for its attractive foliage and vibrant colors. The classification of Coleus niveus can vary depending on the source and taxonomic system used.
